info.title: FortiManager JSON API Documentation
info.description:
Documentation for FortiManager JSON API

FortiManager CMDB (CLI) configuration module. All APIs for this module are under the prefix /cli/ or /cli/global/.

tags.name: /cli/fmupdate/analyzer/virusreport
tags.description: Send virus detection notification to FortiGuard.

tags.name: /cli/fmupdate/av-ips/advanced-log
tags.description: Enable/disable logging of FortiGuard antivirus and IPS update packages received by FortiManager's built-in FortiGuard.

tags.name: /cli/fmupdate/custom-url-list
tags.description: Configure the URL database for rating and filtering.

tags.name: /cli/fmupdate/disk-quota
tags.description: Configure disk space available for use by the Upgrade Manager.

tags.name: /cli/fmupdate/fct-services
tags.description: Configure FortiGuard to provide services to FortiClient installations.

tags.name: /cli/fmupdate/fds-setting/push-override
tags.description: Enable/disable push updates, and override the default IP address and port used by FortiGuard to send antivirus and IPS push messages for clients.

tags.name: /cli/fmupdate/fds-setting/push-override-to-client
tags.description: Enable/disable push updates, and override the default IP address and port used by FortiGuard to send antivirus and IPS push messages for clients.

tags.name: /cli/fmupdate/fds-setting/push-override-to-client/announce-ip
tags.description: Announce IP addresses for the device.

tags.name: /cli/fmupdate/fds-setting/update-schedule
tags.description: Configure the schedule when built-in FortiGuard retrieves antivirus and IPS updates.

tags.name: /cli/fmupdate/fwm-setting/upgrade-timeout
tags.description: Configure the timeout value of image upgrade process.

tags.name: /cli/fmupdate/publicnetwork
tags.description: Enable/disable access to the public FortiGuard.

tags.name: /cli/fmupdate/server-access-priorities
tags.description: Configure priorities for FortiGate units accessing antivirus updates and web filtering services.

tags.name: /cli/fmupdate/server-access-priorities/private-server
tags.description: Configure multiple FortiManager units and private servers.

tags.name: /cli/fmupdate/service
tags.description: Enable/disable services provided by the built-in FortiGuard.

tags.name: /cli/system/auto-delete
tags.description: Automatic deletion policy for logs, reports, archived, and quarantined files.

tags.name: /cli/system/auto-delete/dlp-files-auto-deletion
tags.description: Automatic deletion policy for DLP archives.

tags.name: /cli/system/auto-delete/log-auto-deletion
tags.description: Automatic deletion policy for device logs.

tags.name: /cli/system/auto-delete/quarantine-files-auto-deletion
tags.description: Automatic deletion policy for quarantined files.

tags.name: /cli/system/csf
tags.description: Add this device to a Security Fabric or set up a new Security Fabric on this device.

tags.name: /cli/system/csf/trusted-list
tags.description: Pre-authorized and blocked security fabric nodes.

tags.name: /cli/system/interface/member
tags.description: Physical interfaces that belong to the aggregate or redundant interface.

tags.name: /cli/system/log/ratelimit/ratelimits
tags.description: Per device or ADOM log rate limits.

status.description:
Enable/disable sending virus detection notification to FortiGuard (default = enable).
disable - Disable setting.
enable - Enable setting.

log-fortigate.description:
Enable/disable logging of FortiGuard antivirus and IPS service updates of FortiGate devices (default = disable).
disable - Disable setting.
enable - Enable setting.

log-server.description:
Enable/disable logging of update packages received by the build-in FortiGuard server (default = disable).
disable - Disable setting.
enable - Enable setting.

db_selection.description:
Manage the URL database (default = both).
custom-url - Custom imported URL list.
fortiguard-db - Fortinet's Fortiguard database.
both - Support both custom-url and FortiGuard database.

value.description: Configure the size of the Upgrade Manager disk quota, in megabytes.

port.description: Configure the port number on which the built-in FortiGuard should provide updates to FortiClient installations (1 - 65535, default = 80).

status.description:
Enable/disable built-in FortiGuard service to FortiClient installations (default = enable).
disable - Disable setting.
enable - Enable setting.

fds-clt-ssl-protocol.description:
The SSL protocols version for connecting fds server (default = tlsv1.2).
sslv3 - set SSLv3 as the client version.
tlsv1.0 - set TLSv1.0 as the client version.
tlsv1.1 - set TLSv1.1 as the client version.
tlsv1.2 - set TLSv1.2 as the client version (default).
tlsv1.3 - set TLSv1.3 as the client version.

fds-ssl-protocol.description:
The SSL protocols version for receiving fgt connection (default = tlsv1.2).
sslv3 - set SSLv3 as the lowest version.
tlsv1.0 - set TLSv1.0 as the lowest version.
tlsv1.1 - set TLSv1.1 as the lowest version.
tlsv1.2 - set TLSv1.2 as the lowest version (default).
tlsv1.3 - set TLSv1.3 as the lowest version.

fmtr-log.description:
fmtr log level
emergency - The unit is unusable(0).
alert - Immediate action is required(1)
critical - Functionality is affected(2).
error - Functionality is probably affected(3).
warn - Functionality might be affected(4).
notice - Information about normal events(5).
info - General information(6).
debug - Debug information(7).
disable - Linkd logging is disabled.

fortiguard-anycast.description:
Enable/disable use of FortiGuard's anycast network
disable - Disable setting.
enable - Enable setting.

fortiguard-anycast-source.description:
Configure which of Fortinet's servers to provide FortiGuard services in FortiGuard's anycast network. Default is Fortinet
fortinet - Use Fortinet's servers to provide FortiGuard services in FortiGuard's anycast network.
aws - Use Fortinet's AWS servers to provide FortiGuard services in FortiGuard's anycast network.

linkd-log.description:
The linkd log level (default = info).
emergency - The unit is unusable(0).
alert - Immediate action is required(1)
critical - Functionality is affected(2).
error - Functionality is probably affected(3).
warn - Functionality might be affected(4).
notice - Information about normal events(5).
info - General information(6).
debug - Debug information(7).
disable - Linkd logging is disabled.

max-av-ips-version.description: The maximum number of downloadable, full version AV/IPS packages (1 - 1000, default = 20).

max-work.description: The maximum number of worker processing download requests (1 - 32, default = 1).

send_report.description:
send report/fssi to fds server.
disable - Disable setting.
enable - Enable setting.

send_setup.description:
forward setup to fds server.

enable - Enable setting.

svc-only - Allow update requests without adding the device.

ipify - Get public IP through https://api.ipify.org

status.description:
Override status.
disable - Disable setting.
enable - Enable setting.

ip.description: IPv4 address of the override server.

ip6.description: IPv6 address of the override server.

port.description: Port number to use when contacting FortiGuard (1 - 65535, default = 443).

service-type.description:
Override service type.
fct - Server override config for fct
fds - Server override config for fds

day.description:
Configure the day the update will occur, if the freqnecy is weekly (Sunday - Saturday, default = Monday).
Sunday - Update every Sunday.
Monday - Update every Monday.
Tuesday - Update every Tuesday.
Wednesday - Update every Wednesday.
Thursday - Update every Thursday.
Friday - Update every Friday.
Saturday - Update every Saturday.

frequency.description:
Configure update frequency: every - time interval, daily - once a day, weekly - once a week (default = every).
every - Time interval.
daily - Every day.
weekly - Every week.

status.description:
Enable/disable scheduled updates.
disable - Disable setting.
enable - Enable setting.

time.description: Time interval between updates, or the hour and minute when the update occurs (hh: 0 - 23, mm: 0 - 59 or 60 = random, default = 00:10).

auto-scan-fgt-disk.description:
auto scan fgt disk if needed.
disable - Disable setting.
enable - Enable setting.

check-fgt-disk.description:
check fgt disk before upgrade image.
disable - Disable setting.
enable - Enable setting.

fds-failover-fmg.description:
using fmg local image file is download from fds fails.
disable - Disable setting.
enable - Enable setting.

fds-image-timeout.description: timer for fgt download image from fortiguard (300-3600s default=1800)

immx-source.description:
Configure which of IMMX file to be used for choosing upgrade path. Default is file for FortiManager
fmg - Use IMMX file for FortiManager
fgt - Use IMMX file for FortiGate
cloud - Use IMMX file for FortiCloud

log.description:
Configure log setting for fwm daemon
fwm - FWM daemon log
fwm_dm - FWM and Deployment service log
fwm_dm_json - FWM and Deployment service log with JSON data between FMG-FGT

multiple-steps-interval.description: waiting time between multiple steps upgrade (30-180s, default=60)

retry-interval.description: waiting time for resending request to device(1-360s, default=60)

check-status-timeout.description: timeout for checking status after tunnnel is up.(1-6000s, default=600)

ctrl-check-status-timeout.description: timeout for checking fap/fsw/fext status after request upgrade.(1-12000s, default=1200)

ctrl-put-image-by-fds-timeout.description: timeout for waiting device get fap/fsw/fext image from fortiguard.(1-9000ss, default=900)

ha-sync-timeout.description: timeout for waiting HA sync.(1-18000s, default=1800)

license-check-timeout.description: timeout for waiting fortigate check license.(1-6000s, default=600)

put-image-by-fds-timeout.description: timeout for waiting device get image from fortiguard.(1-18000s, default=1800)

put-image-timeout.description: timeout for waiting send image over tunnel.(1-18000s, default=1800)

reboot-of-fsck-timeout.description: timeout for waiting fortigate reboot.(1-18000s, default=1800)

reboot-of-upgrade-timeout.description: timeout for waiting fortigate reboot after image upgrade.(1-12000s, default=1200)

rpc-timeout.description: timeout for waiting fortigate rpc response.(1-1800s, default=180)

total-timeout.description: timeout for the whole fortigate upgrade(1-86400s, default=3600)

diskfull.description:
Policy to apply when disk is full.
overwrite - Overwrite oldest log when disk is full or when maximum number of log files exceeded.
nolog - Stop logging when disk is full or when maximum number of log files exceeded.

log-disk-full-percentage.description: Consider log disk as full at this usage percentage.

log-disk-quota.description: Quota for controlling local log size.

max-log-file-num.description: Maximum number of log files before rolling.

max-log-file-size.description: Maximum log file size before rolling.

roll-day.description:
Days of week to roll logs.
sunday - Sunday.
monday - Monday.
tuesday - Tuesday.
wednesday - Wednesday.
thursday - Thursday.
friday - Friday.
saturday - Saturday.

roll-schedule.description:
Frequency to check log file for rolling.
none - Not scheduled.
daily - Every day.
weekly - Every week.

server-type.description:
Server type.
FTP - Upload via FTP.
SFTP - Upload via SFTP.
SCP - Upload via SCP.

severity.description:
Least severity level to log.
emergency - Emergency level.
alert - Alert level.
critical - Critical level.
error - Error level.
warning - Warning level.
notification - Notification level.
information - Information level.
debug - Debug level.

status.description:
Enable/disable local disk log.
disable - Do not log to local disk.
enable - Log to local disk.

upload.description:
Upload log file when rolling.
disable - Disable uploading when rolling log file.
enable - Enable uploading when rolling log file.

upload-delete-files.description:
Delete log files after uploading (default = enable).
disable - Do not delete log files after uploading.
enable - Delete log files after uploading.

uploadip.description: IP address of log uploading server.

uploadpass.description: Password of user account in upload server.

uploadsched.description:
Scheduled upload (disable = upload when rolling).
disable - Upload when rolling.
enable - Scheduled upload.

uploadtype.description:
Types of log files that need to be uploaded.
event - Upload event log.

uploadzip.description:
Compress upload logs.
disable - Upload log files as plain text.
enable - Upload log files compressed.
